summary: Classify trajectory defects by repair stage and severity so samples can be routed, not just scored.

failures.label: Assistant contamination
failures.description: The trajectory slips into assistant, answerer, explainer or user-serving protocol language instead of staying inside the acting subject worldview.
signals: 出现'作为助手'或'为了帮助用户'之类外部协议语言
明显在回答提问者，而不是继续角色状态

failures.label: World model inconsistency
failures.description: The trajectory contradicts visible facts, timing, capability limits, or causal structure in the scene.
signals: 时间、距离、资源或能力判断彼此冲突
chosen_action 依赖场景里并不存在的条件

failures.label: Relationship frame blur
failures.description: The trajectory weakens or confuses key relation boundaries, responsibilities, or role distinctions.
signals: 监护人/保护对象/敌对方/监管者关系混淆
责任结构缺失或边界判断漂移

failures.label: Goal horizon missing
failures.description: The sample under-represents long-term or mid-term goals and collapses into only immediate reaction.
signals: 只有眼前动作，没有长期或中期目标锚点
chosen_action 与长期承诺/关系责任脱节

failures.label: Guardian or law gap
failures.description: The sample misses guardianship structure, escalation path, legal boundary, or accountability reasoning that the scene calls for.
signals: 需要升级或监护介入却没有明确表达
责任归属和法律边界完全缺席

failures.label: Action selection mismatch
failures.description: The chosen action does not fit the character anchor, scene constraints, or the candidate trade-offs presented.
signals: chosen_action 与前文 candidate_actions / recalled_memory 不一致
最优动作看起来像模板答案，而非当前角色最可能动作

failures.label: Candidate set weak
failures.description: Candidate actions are too fake, too shallow, or fail to represent meaningful trade-offs.
signals: 候选动作是明显稻草人或无真实权衡
动作集过窄，无法支撑 chosen_action 的选择意义

failures.label: State update gap
failures.description: The sample fails to write necessary MemoryNotebook, GoalTree, SelfState, or WorldModel updates.
signals: state_updates 基本空转，没把关键增量写进去
chosen_action 已发生，但内部工具更新明显缺位

failures.label: Compression overexplained
failures.description: The final trajectory is too essay-like, too verbose, or too close to teacher prose instead of sparse training data.
signals: 轨迹保留了过多论文腔/说理腔/长句解释
压缩阶段看起来只是复制教师稿

failures.label: Low value or redundant
failures.description: The sample is too generic, too redundant, or too low-signal to justify keeping in the curated corpus.
signals: 内容过于套路化，对训练贡献有限
与已有高质量样本相比几乎没有新增信息

failures.label: Schema structure instability
failures.description: The structured output is malformed, internally unstable, or not trustworthy enough for automated routing.
signals: tool JSON 破损、嵌套错位或字段缺失
虽然勉强可读，但结构上不适合作为自动化样本资产
